task_results.2_why_zero_outbound_receipts: Census rule-4 root cause: the pipeline was built to skeleton stage on 2026-07-07/08 (spec LS-051 + queue file + checker LS-053) and implementation stopped. The three upstream data artifacts (ICP strangers, priced offers, ladder state) were never created; none of the four cron motors (draft/stale-gate/classify/mutate, spec §5) was ever registered — data/trigger-registry-v1.json does not exist. Zero inputs + zero motor = zero drafts = zero dispatchable drafts = zero approvals = zero sends = zero gateway_outbound_log_v1 receipts. Compounding: the spec's own mandatory watchdog (WORKER_IS_THE_STALE_GATE at 7 days of zero dispatchable drafts) never fired in 15 days because the watchdog motor was also never built — the stall detector itself is stalled. Corroborating census rule-2: META $20/mo > GUARD+REVENUE $15/mo — the machine spends more grooming itself than selling, which matches the founder's 2026-07-23 complaint verbatim.
task_results.3_sends_founder_blocked_confirmed: CONFIRMED — queue is empty (no item in any state), draft_template.approval.required=true, checker FAILs the template on 5 predicates so nothing can reach queued_for_approval, no approved_pending_send or sent entry exists anywhere, and this audit advanced no state.
4_minimum_missing_for_one_compliant_draf: one named real ICP stranger in data/commercial_pulse_icp_v1.json
one priced Noetfield offer in data/commercial_pulse_offers_v1.json
CASL block: Noetfield Systems Inc. mailing address + working unsubscribe URL
one link-check receipt covering every link used in the draft
then: machine drafts, checker PASS, queued_for_approval -> founder approval gate (legitimate closed-set gate: external send)
